entities.name: Em-dashes
entities.context: Punctuation technique for natural phrasing in writing

entities.name: Clarity-first
entities.context: Writing principle prioritizing clear communication over corporate jargon

entities.name: Conversational confidence
entities.context: Communication tone that balances confidence without being salesy or timid

entities.name: Genuine warmth
entities.context: Authentic friendliness in communication without excessive enthusiasm

entities.name: Specificity
entities.context: Using actual numbers, concrete details, and real context in writing

entities.name: AI-speak
entities.context: Corporate jargon and buzzwords to avoid (leverage synergies, utilize, ecosystem)

entities.name: Hedging language
entities.context: Overly cautious phrasing to avoid (I think maybe possibly)

entities.name: Over-formality
entities.context: Stiff formal writing style to avoid

entities.name: Generic templates
entities.context: Boilerplate phrases to avoid (I hope this email finds you well)

entities.name: Fake enthusiasm
entities.context: Inauthentic excitement to avoid in writing

relationships.context: Both are core V voice principles for authentic communication
Both contribute to authentic, grounded communication style
Both are anti-patterns in V's voice guidelines
Both represent inauthentic communication patterns to avoid
Em-dashes serve clarity by enabling natural phrasing
Specificity is the antidote to generic template language
